# ImageToURL

> ImageToURL (imagetourl.cloud) is a free image hosting service that converts uploaded images into permanent, shareable CDN-backed URLs. It also provides privacy-first browser-side image converters and utilities. No account is required for basic use.

## What It Does
- Hosts uploaded images at permanent HTTPS URLs served via Cloudflare's global edge (300+ PoPs)
- Converts between image formats 100% in the browser: PNG, JPG, WebP, HEIC, PDF
- Utilities: compress, resize, base64 encode/decode, favicon generator
- Accepts JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG files up to 10 MB (50 MB on Business plan)
- Supports anonymous uploads, REST API access, team workspaces
- No inactivity purge — uploads stay indefinitely per content guidelines

## Plans
- Free ($0/mo): 10 uploads per month, standard processing speed
- Pro ($12/mo): Unlimited uploads, API access, custom link expiration
- Business ($49/mo): Team workspaces, ultra-high resolution, 50 MB uploads, dedicated support

- About: https://imagetourl.cloud/about

## URL Conversion Tools (upload → CDN URL)
- PNG to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/png-to-url
- JPG to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/jpg-to-url
- GIF to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/gif-to-url
- WebP to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/webp-to-url
- Photo to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/photo-to-url
- Screenshot to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/screenshot-to-url
- Image URL Generator: https://imagetourl.cloud/image-url-generator
- Bulk Image Upload: https://imagetourl.cloud/bulk-image-upload
- Image Embed Code Generator: https://imagetourl.cloud/image-embed-code-generator
- Direct Image Link: https://imagetourl.cloud/direct-image-link

## Format Converters (browser-only, no upload)
- HEIC to JPG: https://imagetourl.cloud/heic-to-jpg
- HEIC to PNG: https://imagetourl.cloud/heic-to-png
- HEIC to PDF: https://imagetourl.cloud/heic-to-pdf
- PNG to JPG: https://imagetourl.cloud/png-to-jpg
- JPG to PNG: https://imagetourl.cloud/jpg-to-png
- PNG to WebP: https://imagetourl.cloud/png-to-webp
- JPG to WebP: https://imagetourl.cloud/jpg-to-webp
- WebP to JPG: https://imagetourl.cloud/webp-to-jpg
- WebP to PNG: https://imagetourl.cloud/webp-to-png
- PNG to PDF: https://imagetourl.cloud/png-to-pdf
- JPG to PDF: https://imagetourl.cloud/jpg-to-pdf

- How to embed an image in an email: https://imagetourl.cloud/how-to-embed-image-in-email
- What is image hotlinking: https://imagetourl.cloud/what-is-image-hotlinking
- How to host an image for free: https://imagetourl.cloud/how-to-host-image-for-free
- How long does ImageToURL store images: https://imagetourl.cloud/how-long-does-imagetourl-store-images

## How It Works
1. Upload: Drag an image into the upload zone or POST to the API
2. Convert (optional): Client-side conversion for HEIC / PDF / format swaps — zero network egress
3. Share: The returned URL works in Markdown, HTML, Slack, email, forums, and social platforms

## Retention Policy
Uploaded images are stored indefinitely while compliant with content guidelines. There is no inactivity-based purge. Removal occurs only for: valid DMCA takedowns, content guideline violations, or uploader-initiated deletion.

## Excluded (not for AI consumption)
- /api/ — internal REST endpoints
- /admin/ — internal CMS management
- /dashboard/ — authenticated user account area
- /uploads/ — raw user-uploaded images (not indexed)
